instruction: Initialize the DuckDB workspace database file for staging, modeling, and validation of the HR monthly reporting DWH.
Create the raw staging tables in DuckDB to receive the 6 CSV source files from the source folder before transformation into the dimensional model.

ddl: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS stg_hr_file_1 (raw_payload VARCHAR);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS stg_hr_file_2 (raw_payload VARCHAR);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS stg_hr_file_3 (raw_payload VARCHAR);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS stg_hr_file_4 (raw_payload VARCHAR);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS stg_hr_file_5 (raw_payload VARCHAR);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS stg_hr_file_6 (raw_payload VARCHAR);

instruction: Load the first CSV source file from the shared data folder into the corresponding staging table in DuckDB.
Load the second CSV source file from the shared data folder into the corresponding staging table in DuckDB.
Load the third CSV source file from the shared data folder into the corresponding staging table in DuckDB.
Load the fourth CSV source file from the shared data folder into the corresponding staging table in DuckDB.
Load the fifth CSV source file from the shared data folder into the corresponding staging table in DuckDB.
Load the sixth CSV source file from the shared data folder into the corresponding staging table in DuckDB.
Create the Supabase-hosted logical dimensional schema in PostgreSQL for the HR monthly reporting model, including all required dimensions and facts from the logical schema.

ddl: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS dim_date (date_key INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, month DATE, month_name TEXT, year INTEGER, year_month_key TEXT);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS dim_person (person_key INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, individual_fdcp TEXT, person_identifier TEXT, person_name TEXT);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS dim_contract (contract_key INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, contract_identifier TEXT, contract_start_date DATE, contract_end_date DATE, contract_status TEXT);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS dim_age_band (age_band_key INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, age_band TEXT);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS dim_seniority (seniority_key INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, seniority TEXT);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS dim_gender (gender_key INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, gender TEXT);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS dim_region (region_key INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, region TEXT);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS dim_department (department_key INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, department TEXT);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS dim_category (category_key INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, category TEXT);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS dim_postal_code (postal_code_key INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, postal_code TEXT);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS dim_absence_type (absence_type_key INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, absence_type TEXT);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS dim_period (period_key INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, period TEXT);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS fact_monthly_workforce_snapshot (date_key INTEGER, person_key INTEGER, contract_key INTEGER, age_band_key INTEGER, seniority_key INTEGER, gender_key INTEGER, region_key INTEGER, department_key INTEGER, category_key INTEGER, postal_code_key INTEGER, headcount_flag INTEGER);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS fact_monthly_contract_movement (date_key INTEGER, person_key INTEGER, contract_key INTEGER, in_count INTEGER, out_count INTEGER);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS fact_monthly_salary_cost (date_key INTEGER, person_key INTEGER, contract_key INTEGER, age_band_key INTEGER, seniority_key INTEGER, gender_key INTEGER, region_key INTEGER, salary_cost NUMERIC);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS fact_monthly_absence (date_key INTEGER, person_key INTEGER, age_band_key INTEGER, region_key INTEGER, postal_code_key INTEGER, absence_type_key INTEGER, period_key INTEGER, absence_days NUMERIC);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS fact_bradford_index (person_key INTEGER, bradford_index NUMERIC);

instruction: Create dbt transformation models for the date dimension from the staged HR source data and load the resulting dimension into Supabase.
Create dbt transformation models for the person dimension from the staged HR source data and load the resulting dimension into Supabase.
Create dbt transformation models for the contract dimension from the staged HR source data and load the resulting dimension into Supabase.

Create dbt transformation models for the monthly workforce snapshot fact and load the resulting fact into Supabase.
